allow: PowerShell(node -e "import\('docx'\).then\(async m => { const { Document, Packer, Paragraph, TextRun, Footer, PageNumber } = m; const doc = new Document\({ sections: [{ footers: { default: new Footer\({ children: [new Paragraph\({ children: [new TextRun\({ children: [PageNumber.CURRENT] }\)] }\)] }\) }, children: [new Paragraph\({ children: [new TextRun\('test'\)] }\)] }] }\); const buf = await Packer.toBuffer\(doc\); require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('test.docx', buf\); console.log\('ok'\) }\)")
